name: Live Lens
description: Records bounded timing spans for OpenClaw turns, tools, model calls, compaction, and external plugin spans.

enabled.description: Record timing spans from OpenClaw hooks and the span ingest endpoint.

databasePath.description: Plugin-relative SQLite database path for timing spans.

recordHooks.description: Record spans from OpenClaw typed hooks.

captureContent.description: Store bounded prompt/message/tool content fields. Disabled by default.

maxAttributeChars.description: Maximum JSON characters retained per span attributes payload.

maxIngestBytes.description: Maximum accepted HTTP ingest body size.
